if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR r.role_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR r.role_code ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND r.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND r.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND r.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND r.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectById */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS role_type_cd_nm FROM sy_role r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'ROLE_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.role_type_cd WHERE r.role_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS role_type_cd_nm FROM sy_role r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'ROLE_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.role_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectPageList */ r.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_rt.code_label AS role_type_cd_nm FROM sy_role r LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = r.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_rt ON cd_rt.code_grp = 'ROLE_TYPE' AND cd_rt.code_value = r.role_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(r.*) /* base.sy :: SyRole :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_role r
